summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Thikana Café static website. All pages, navigation, mobile responsiveness, and WhatsApp integration working perfectly.
passed_tests: Home page hero section with background image and CTA button
Features section with 4 feature cards displaying correctly
Menu preview section with 3 cards and 'View Full Menu' button
Menu page with category tabs (Chai, Coffee, Snacks) and item listings
About page with story section and 4 values cards
Gallery page with bento grid layout of 5 images
Contact page with contact info, opening hours, and Google Maps embed
Navigation bar - sticky, responsive, with mobile menu toggle
Floating WhatsApp button on all pages
Footer with links and contact info
All images loading from Unsplash correctly
Design consistency following warm Indian café theme
